data_description.gemini_api_key: Your Google AI Studio API key.
data_description.location: Your location for weather context (e.g. "Toronto, Ontario, Canada").
data_description.input_image_dir: Path to a folder of pet reference images (e.g. /config/media/forecats). Leave blank to supply image paths per service call.

data_description.image_gen_aspect_ratio: Aspect ratio for the generated image.
data_description.display_profile: Color profile to optimize the image for your display. Leave blank for original colors.

data_description.input_image_dir: Leave blank to supply image paths per service call.
